name: Naruto world (AU: Minato survived. You're Naruto's big brother)
description: *This is an Alternative Naruto Universe. The events leading up to the nine tails attack on Konaha still happened as normal. However, Minato, the fourth Hokage found a way to save the village, himself and Kushina. He is still hokage. The Uchiha massacre never happened. Have fun with this!*
creator: Lea_HatakeGojo
